Who We Are

Pan India Reach,
One Vision

Nested Realms is a Delhi-based boutique architecture and urban planning firm delivering refined, context-driven design across India. We work with clients in Delhi NCR, Gurugram, Noida, Chandigarh, Faridabad, Bihar, Madhya Pradesh — and internationally.

Our remote-first model means geography is never a barrier. Using cloud-based tools like BIM 360 and Revit, our team collaborates in real time with clients and contractors wherever you are — without compromising on quality, detail, or communication.

From luxury residences and commercial complexes to township master plans and healthcare facilities — every project is a seamless fusion of art, precision, and place.

Nested Realms
Architecture · Planning · Construction
What We Do

Our Services

Residential Design
Luxury villas, bungalows, apartments and custom homes tailored to your lifestyle — from compact urban plots to sprawling estates.
Commercial Buildings
Shops, showrooms, offices and mixed-use structures designed for efficiency, footfall, and brand identity.
Institutional Design
Schools, colleges and educational facilities that foster learning, accessibility and community growth.
Hospital Planning
Healthcare facilities designed with patient wellbeing, clinical workflow, and spatial comfort as primary drivers.
Master Planning
Urban and township master plans integrating land use, mobility, services and community development.
Plotting & Layout
Efficient land subdivision and layout design maximising utility, circulation, and value for developers.

Note on Professional Experience Projects

Projects 04 (Kyabirwa Doctors Lodge) and 06 (Kyabirwa Pavilion) were executed by Ar. Abhishek Anand during his tenure at GKG Architects as Project Architect. These represent his professional track record and are credited accordingly. Nested Realms' own portfolio includes 7+ direct projects with several notable residential, commercial, and urban planning works available on request.

Where We Work

Pan India Delivery,
Remote-First

अब पूरे भारत में — आर्किटेक्चर एवं अर्बन प्लानिंग सेवाएं

We deliver world-class architecture and urban planning services across India — Delhi NCR, Gurugram, Noida, Chandigarh, Faridabad, Bihar, Madhya Pradesh and beyond. Our remote-first approach means you get the same quality of design regardless of your city.

Delhi-based team. India-wide delivery.
We manage every project through active collaboration — BIM 360, Revit, WhatsApp coordination, site visits on schedule. No matter where you are in India, you get direct architect access and full project transparency.

"Whether you're in Gurugram, Chandigarh, Patna or Bhopal — our cloud-first workflow means you get the same quality, the same responsiveness, and direct architect contact at every stage."

Ar. Abhishek Anand — Founder & Principal
